info.title: Odoo Warung Lakku — Business API (Compact)
info.description:
Compact OpenAPI spec for key business models only.
Odoo 17.0-20260609 | Database: warunglakku-odoo

Models included: product, partner, sale, purchase, account, stock, CRM, POS, HR, MRP, project, UoM
